title: sertula maior
intro: Sertula maior, also known as the upland burdock or greater burdock, is a biennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Sertula maior include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in the production of burdock root extract, which is often used as a dietary supplement.
